item.name: Shadowtongue
item.description:
When caught in the light, the scales of this ancient wavekin glint with a dark luster.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This ancient wavekin is wreathed in lustrous metallic scales. It is said that in the age of conflict between the Mamool Ja and Xbr'aal, these sturdy scales were used in the making of plate armor and other protective gear.
